title: Copper Amulets
body:
Showcase by Power219
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lec68pHfQRQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

This mod need a [Curios API (Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) mod to work.

        AMULETS:
        
Iron Amulet - Resistance I

Gold Amulet - Haste II, makes piglins neutral

Lapis Amulet - Give one experience point every 5 seconds

Redstone Amulet - Night Vision

Quartz Amulet - Heal 2 hearts every 10 seconds

Diamond Amulet - Strenght I, Resistance II

Emerald Amulet - Hero of the Village I

Netherite Amulet - Strenght II, Resistance II, Fire Resistance I

End Amulet - Regeneration II, Jump Boost III, makes endermans neutral

Amethyst Amulet - Speed II

Echo Amulet - Speed IV (only when you're sneaking)

Ocean Amulet - Dolphin Grace I, Conduit Power I

Lucky Amulet - Luck I

Obsidian Amulet - Resistance III, Slowness I

Slime Amulet - Jump Boost II

Feather Amulet - Slow Falling I

Levitation Amulet - Levitation II (togglable, default keybing - I)

AMULET OF AMULETS - Resistance II, Haste I, Strength II, Luck I, Conduit Power I, Night Vision, Hero of the Village I, Fire Resistance I, makes piglins neutral, makes endermans neutral


          STRUCTURES:

Underwater Ruin: Generates on at the bottom deep oceans

Ancient Chamber: Generates from Y-level -10 to -60 in deep darks

End Chamber: it appears rarely on the surface of the End.

End City Chamber: it appears rarely on the surface of the End.
